# @vlting/ui

> Cross-platform design system built on Tamagui v2. Multi-brand theming, tree-shakeable imports. Web + React Native.

## Install

```
npm install @vlting/ui
```

## Quick Start

```tsx
import { Provider, Button, Card, Input } from '@vlting/ui'
import { createBrandConfig, defaultBrand } from '@vlting/ui'

const config = createBrandConfig(defaultBrand)

<Provider config={config}>
  <Card>
    <Card.Content>
      <Input placeholder="Name" />
      <Button>Submit</Button>
    </Card.Content>
  </Card>
</Provider>
```

## Architecture

- **Layer 0 — Design Tokens**: size, space, radius, color, zIndex, borderWidth
- **Layer 1 — Primitives** (16): Box, Stack, VStack, HStack, Text, Heading, Icon, Divider, Spacer, Portal, Label, VisuallyHidden, Badge, Skeleton, Separator, AspectRatio, Spinner, Kbd
- **Layer 2 — Components** (52): Button, Input, Card, Dialog, Form, DataTable, Chart, Select, Tabs, Accordion, and more
- **Layer 3 — Blocks** (10): AuthBlock, SidebarBlock, DashboardBlock, DataTableBlock, SettingsBlock, PricingBlock, HeroBlock, FeedBlock, AppShellBlock, EmptyStateBlock
- **Charts** (8): AreaChart, BarChart, LineChart, PieChart, RadarChart, RadialChart + ChartTooltip, ChartLegend
- **Icons**: 3229 Remix Icons, tree-shakeable

## Import Paths

- `@vlting/ui` — everything
- `@vlting/ui/primitives` — Layer 1
- `@vlting/ui/components` — Layer 2
- `@vlting/ui/blocks` — Layer 3
- `@vlting/ui/icons` — Remix Icons

## Brands

4 built-in: `defaultBrand`, `shadcnBrand`, `funBrand`, `poshBrand`

```tsx
import { createBrandConfig, shadcnBrand } from '@vlting/ui'
const config = createBrandConfig(shadcnBrand)
```

## Key Concepts

- **Tokens**: Always use token values (`$4`, `$background`), never hardcode pixels or colors
- **Compound components**: Most components use `Component.Sub` pattern (e.g., `Card.Header`, `Dialog.Content`)
- **Cross-platform**: Most components work on web + React Native; some (NavigationMenu, DataTable, ContextMenu) are web-only
- **Theming**: Semantic color tokens (`$background`, `$color`, `$borderColor`) adapt to brand and light/dark mode

## Resources

- Full AI Skill: docs/ai/SKILL.md
- Component Registry (JSON): docs/ai/registry.json
- Comprehensive Reference: docs/ai/llms-full.txt
- API Mappings (shadcn migration): api-mappings.json
